arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the domain list.

creation_time.description: The time when the domain list was created.

creator_request_id.description: A unique string used to identify the request that created the domain list.

domain_count.description: The number of domains in the domain list.

id.description: The identifier of the domain list.

managed_owner_name.description: The name of the owner managing the domain list.

modification_time.description: The time when the domain list was last modified.

name.description: The name of the domain list.

status.description: The current status of the domain list.

status_message.description: A message providing more details about the status of the domain list.
